name: Brule River State Forest (Bois Brule at US-2, Brule)
notes: Wild brown trout and Lake Superior steelhead water in the state forest.

name: Willow River State Park (Willow Falls)
notes: Stocked trout fishery; state park vehicle admission sticker required.

name: Kinnickinnic River Fishery Area (below River Falls)
notes: 14 DNR parking lots serve this Class 1 wild brown trout stream.

name: Root River Steelhead Facility / Lincoln Park (Racine)
notes: Spring and fall steelhead runs near the DNR egg-take facility.

name: Besadny Anadromous Fish Facility (Kewaunee River)
notes: DNR spawning facility; public bank access on the lower Kewaunee.
